business.title: Buy capital goods on dips, stay cautious on IT and consumption: Sudip Bandyopadhyay
business.summary: Market expert Sudip Bandyopadhyay outlines investment strategies across key sectors. He sees opportunities in State Bank of India and a generational re-rating for the pharma sector. Capital goods also present long-term buying windows. Consumption requires caution for the next two quarters. The IT sector remains in a wait-and-watch zone. Investors can build long-term portfolios by picking quality stocks.

business.title: Sebi sets 30-day delay for use of stock price data in educational content; effective from July 1
business.summary: Sebi has introduced a new rule for market data. Stock exchanges and other institutions must now delay educational price data by 30 days. This change aims to prevent misuse and confusion. The new rule starts from July 1, 2026. NISM, Sebi's training arm, gets an exception for its simulation lab. This move clarifies the difference between education and advice.

business.title: From diplomacy to development partnership: Jaishankar reinforces India-Suriname ties
business.summary: The two sides discussed strengthening collaboration in defence and security, health, trade and commerce, infrastructure, education, sports, culture, traditional systems of medicine, and agriculture

business.title: Vijay Kedia Portfolio Check: 10 stocks surge up to 44% — plus 5 fresh picks
business.summary: In terms of CY26 price performance, the portfolio delivered mixed results, with 13 stocks posting positive returns, while the remaining holdings registered losses. ETMarkets has highlighted 10 stocks that gained between 10% and 44%. The analysis also points to five new additions made during the March 2026 quarter. (Data Source: ACE Equity, Trendlyne)

business.title: Indian market poised for double-digit earnings growth over next 2 years: Dikshit Mittal
business.summary: Indian markets present a strong case for investors. While the Nifty index appears flat, mid- and small-cap stocks are showing robust earnings growth. Current valuations are attractive for long-term investors. Analysts anticipate a re-acceleration in earnings driven by key sectors. Geopolitical resolutions could further boost market sentiment, paving the way for sustained double-digit profit growth.

business.title: Concurrent Gainers: 14 stocks gain for 5 straight sessions, rally up to 25%

business.title: FII ownership hits 14-year low to 14.7%; DII cushions Indian markets with 18.9% rise: Report
business.summary: Foreign Institutional Investor (FII) ownership as a percentage of total Indian equities has fallen from 19.9 per cent in April 2016 to 14.7 per cent in April 2026, marking its lowest level since June 2012, according to JM Financial's Fundamental Research report.

business.title: IPO Calendar: 2 issues to keep investors busy but mainboard activity remains muted
business.summary: India's primary market is set for a busy week with two SME IPOs. RFBL Flexi Pack and Goldline Pharmaceutical will open for subscription on May 12, aiming to raise close to Rs 47 crore. Investors can gain exposure to flexible packaging and pharmaceutical sectors. Tentative listings are scheduled for May 19.

business.title: Silver’s volatility in 2026: Macroeconomic drivers, speculative dynamics and investment implications
business.summary: Silver experienced a dramatic price plunge in 2026, falling from an all-time high to nearly $60 per ounce. This volatility stemmed from macroeconomic pressures and speculative unwinding, not fundamental weakness. Despite its diminished safe-haven status, strong industrial demand, particularly in green tech, and persistent supply deficits offer long-term support.

business.title: Bull trap or trend reversal? Rupak De breaks down Nifty’s 24,500 congestion zone
business.summary: Indian equity markets are at a crucial juncture, with the Nifty hovering around 24,500, facing strong resistance. Analysts warn of a potential correction if the index fails to breach 24,750 soon. While some stocks like CG Power and M&M show resilience, the Bank Nifty's momentum is fading. Traders are advised to watch for dips in Vedanta and Firstsource.

business.title: Chhattisgarh, Odisha and Jharkhand record highest minimum wage disparity in India: SBI Report

business.title: Beyond Bitcoin: Why tokenized assets are gaining serious investor attention
business.summary: Indian investors can now access global markets easily. Tokenization converts real-world assets into digital tokens. This allows fractional ownership of international stocks like Tesla and Apple. It offers diversification beyond domestic savings. India's digital payment success positions it for this new financial era. Meaningful participation in global finance is now within reach for everyone.

business.title: US expects Iranian response soon amid clashes in Hormuz

business.title: IMF projects $2.5 billion in 2026 net income despite high uncertainty
business.summary: The International Monetary Fund anticipates a net income of approximately $2.5 billion for the 2026 financial year, with projections for $2.6 billion in both 2027 and 2028.  Precautionary balances are set to reach $35.9 billion by 2026.  The IMF will maintain its lending rate margin at 60 basis points for member countries.
